name: Pull-Up
setup: Grip bar wider than shoulder-width (palms facing away)
Hang with arms fully extended, legs crossed behind
execution: Initiate by pulling shoulders down and back
Pull until chin clears the bar
Lower under control to full hang
common_mistakes: Partial range of motion (not going to full hang)
Looking up (juts chin over bar — can strain neck)
cues: Pull the bar to your sternum
Lead with your chest to the bar
